大家好,

剛看到連登上面有負面評價，內容來自於另一位有做過Kickstarter的巴打。我們想在此澄清一下，我們與他並無任何關係，而且Project 亦完全是兩個獨立個體。在Lihkg出post後，有很多人與我們聯絡，他只是其中一個，我們交流了一些經驗與心得，他亦協助我們share 出去，除了這樣沒有更多的合作關係。

我在這裹可以確保我們是100％能出到貨的，因為我們已經向有關工廠請示了mass production的詳情，絕對能確保集資完成後的安排。而最後，我們亦能為這個project安排退款服務，若支持者有任何不滿均可以退款。

我會向該位巴打反映番今次既事件，希望佢可以作出反應

稍後我亦會係連登作出回應，感謝大家的關注

----
Hello, everyone.

I just saw some negative comment that direct from another creator who started a Kickstarter project. We would like to clarify that we have no relationship with him, and Project is totally two independent individuals. After Lihkg published the post, many people contacted us, he was just one of them, we exchanged some experience, he also helped us share out, in addition to this there is no more partnership.

I am here to make sure that we can deliver 100% of the goods, because we have requested the details of mass production from the factory concerned, and we can definitely ensure the arrangement after the completion of the fund raising. Finally, we can arrange the refund service for this project. If the supporters have any dissatisfaction, they can get a refund.

I will report this incident to the creator and hope he will respond

成件事是咁的，Longtis係我連登ac，並借左比我designer朋友用，前因後果如下：

12月左右Designer FD整緊d霓虹燈既平面design，同左我分享件事，我覺得幾有趣，建議佢做實體應該好多人鍾意。
